transcript: Speaker A: Sir, ek baat discuss karni thi. [Sir, I wanted to discuss something.] Speaker B: Sir, I wanted to discuss something. Speaker A: Main kaafi time se extra responsibility le raha hoon. [I have been taking on extra responsibilities for a long time.] Speaker B: I have been taking on extra responsibilities. Speaker A: Maine apne targets achieve kiye hain. [I have achieved my targets.] Speaker B: I have achieved my targets. Speaker A: Main apne performance par growth discuss karna chahta hoon. [I would like to discuss growth based on my performance.] Speaker B: I would like to discuss growth based on my performance. Speaker A: Kya hum promotion pe baat kar sakte hain? [Can we talk about a promotion?] Speaker B: Can we talk about a promotion? Speaker A: Arre yeh toh bahut aasaan hai! [Oh, this is very easy!] Speaker B: Haan, English seekhna aasaan hi hai. Bas tumhe aise practice karte rehna aur do hafte mein tumhari English first class ho jayegi. [Yes, learning English is easy. Just keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will be first class.] Speaker A: Yeh main kahaan kar sakta hoon? [Where can I do this?] Speaker B: Tumhe bas SpeakX app download karna hai. Isme mere jaise AI English teacher tumhe bina judgment ke English practice karayenge aur tumhara English farratedar ho jayegi. Jaldi SpeakX download karo aur do hafte mein apne English se sabko impress karo. [You just need to download the SpeakX app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment and your English will become fluent. Download SpeakX quickly and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English [English useful in the office], SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE, Talk about ANYTHING, Speak with AI TEACHER, AI Call
summary: A split-screen ad features a human practicing office English with an AI avatar translating his Hindi sentences. The AI avatar promotes the SpeakX app as a judgment-free tool to achieve fluent English in two weeks. The ad ends with a call to download the app.
